steps.t: Nífdir can be found at a small camp to the west of Estolad Mernael. Nenedhel has asked you once again to seek out Nífdir in the heart of the Drownholt…
The Wrathful Huorn stands in Sâd Meryrn. One Mirk-huorn does not seem as malicious as the rest; you should approach it and learn what you can from it.
Nífdir is at the camp overlooking Sâd Meryrn from the north. You should speak with Nífdir and tell him of the strange conversation of sorts that passe…
